title: Slice By Slice
description: A lightweight mod that enhances interactions with cake-like placeable foods, making them more flexible and immersive.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71431abf4a3f1ee0f5abef39bfa92b200700f463_0.webp)
[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75bdd6cb2c3fd9108aa3ea89eb999752c639d90d_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/mfjZyHrWKp)
**Slice By Slice** is a lightweight mod designed to enhance interactions with cake-like placeable food, making them more flexible and immersive.

**Features & Tweaks:**
---
![slice0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7331f2177fb9ebe66fbdfe5d07278022298f78d5.gif)

**Immersive Eating:** Cakes are no longer consumed instantly; instead, like other food items, they require a period of continuous eating to consume a portion.

![slice1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8903b68d421d797499e919b841795566b6e175f.gif)

**Slice Replenishment:** When mods that support cake/pie slices, such as Farmer's Delight, are installed, you can use slices to replenish the corresponding cake/pie blocks.

![slice2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e118783cf896fd1f0749664011da454f58d5202.gif)
 
**Fall Damage Reduction:** Landing on a cake can reduce fall damage. However, be aware that falling from a significant height might not only reduce damage but could also destroy the cake.

![slice3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd13dd63828a5ae922b712284b0b7d5c3b03f2bb.gif)

**Silk Touch Harvesting:** Tools with the "Silk Touch" enchantment can be used to harvest complete cake blocks.

All of these features are configurable.
